title: Miller Orbit FAIL: satellite Q_M residues include forbidden value
_fixture_purpose: FAIL fixture: claims satellite Q_M mod 9 includes residue 5, which is not a quadratic residue mod 9. Validator must catch this violation.

quadratic_residues.claim: Satellite Q_M mod 9 is restricted to QR(9) = {0, 1, 4, 7}
quadratic_residues._note: INTENTIONAL ERROR: residue 5 is not in QR(9)

fail_ledger.message: satellite Q_M residues include forbidden value 5 (not in QR(9))
